# Cord

> Cord is an independent B2B quoting and payments SaaS for any business in Mexico —
> not exclusive to Shopify or to clients of its parent company, Flouvia. Businesses use
> Cord to create quotes with negotiated pricing and credit terms, get them approved via
> a public link, collect payment (cards, SPEI, autonomous AI collections), and issue
> CFDI 4.0 invoices, all without leaving the quote flow.

Cord is built and maintained by the team at Flouvia (flouvia.com), a Mexican company —
but Cord itself is a standalone product with its own domain, billing, and signup, open
to any B2B business in Mexico regardless of whether they use any other Flouvia product.

## Core capabilities

- Quote editor with negotiated pricing, volume pricing tiers, and credit terms (Contado / Net 30 / Net 60)
- Public quote links with e-signature, line-item negotiation chat, and partial approval
- Direct payments via Stripe Connect (cards + SPEI), split into deposit/balance/installments
- Autonomous AI collections agent (opt-in) that negotiates payment plans over email
- CFDI 4.0 electronic invoicing for Mexico via Facturapi
- Multi-currency quoting (MXN/USD/EUR) with FX rate locking
- Team roles, approval thresholds, and audit logging for B2B sales orgs
- AI-powered quote generation from text, PDF, or images (Cord AI)
- Financial budgeting module with master schedules and NPV/IRR/EOQ analysis tools

## Documentation

- [Product docs](https://cordhq.app/docs): Complete user guide covering quotes, payments, budgets, integrations, and account setup
- [API reference](https://cordhq.app/docs/desarrolladores/empezar/apikey): REST API for quotes, clients, products, collections
- [OpenAPI spec](https://cordhq.app/openapi.yaml): machine-readable schema for the full API
- [Webhooks](https://cordhq.app/docs/desarrolladores/herramientas/webhooks): outbound event notifications (quote.sent, quote.paid, etc.), HMAC-signed
- [MCP server](https://cordhq.app/docs/desarrolladores/herramientas/mcp): Model Context Protocol tools for AI agents to query quotes, clients, and receivables
- [Cord Elements](https://cordhq.app/docs/desarrolladores/herramientas/elements/resumen): embeddable quote builder (Web Component, React, Vue) — npm package `@flouviahq/elements`
- [Authentication](https://cordhq.app/docs/desarrolladores/esenciales/autenticacion): API key auth, SSO, and SAML
- [Error handling](https://cordhq.app/docs/desarrolladores/esenciales/errores): standard error codes and responses

## Developer Blog

Technical articles from the Cord engineering team:

- [Billing models for autonomous AI agents](https://cordhq.app/dev-blog/ai-agent-billing): Dimensional usage metering for non-deterministic AI workloads
- [API idempotency patterns](https://cordhq.app/dev-blog/api-idempotency): Safely retry financial API calls with idempotency keys
- [Billing best practices](https://cordhq.app/dev-blog/billing-best-practices): Revenue recognition, proration, and subscription lifecycle
- [Multi-tenant architecture with Neon](https://cordhq.app/dev-blog/building-multi-tenant-architecture): Row-Level Security and connection pooling at scale
- [CLI schema validation](https://cordhq.app/dev-blog/cord-cli-schema-validation): Validate quote schemas before deployment
- [Financial reconciliation with webhooks](https://cordhq.app/dev-blog/financial-reconciliation-webhooks): HMAC verification, idempotent processing, and out-of-order event handling

## Key Documentation Pages

### Payments
- [Payments overview](https://cordhq.app/docs/pagos/resumen): SPEI + card payment infrastructure for B2B in Mexico
- [Payment methods](https://cordhq.app/docs/pagos/metodos): Bank transfer (SPEI), credit/debit cards, credit terms
- [Advance payments](https://cordhq.app/docs/pagos/anticipos): Deposit and balance payment splitting
- [Recurring retainers](https://cordhq.app/docs/pagos/igualas): Monthly retainer billing for service businesses
- [AI collections agent](https://cordhq.app/docs/pagos/cobranza-ia): Autonomous collection negotiation via email
- [CFDI invoicing](https://cordhq.app/docs/pagos/facturacion): CFDI 4.0 electronic invoice stamping via Facturapi

### Quoting
- [Quotes overview](https://cordhq.app/docs/cotizacion/resumen): Create and send B2B quotes with negotiated pricing
- [AI quote generation](https://cordhq.app/docs/cotizacion/ia): Generate quotes from text, PDF, or photos using AI
- [E-signature and audit](https://cordhq.app/docs/interaccion/firma): Legally binding e-signatures with immutable audit trails

### Financial Budgeting
- [Budgets overview](https://cordhq.app/docs/presupuestos/resumen): Master budget schedules for financial planning
- [Analysis tools](https://cordhq.app/docs/presupuestos/herramientas): NPV, IRR, EOQ, and variance analysis calculators

## Product

- [Pricing](https://cordhq.app/precios): 5 plans (Free through Developer), MXN
- [Product overview](https://cordhq.app/producto/editor): the quote editor and full feature set
- [Solutions by industry](https://cordhq.app/soluciones/empresas): enterprise and startup use cases

## Support

- [Help center](https://cordhq.app/soporte): setup guides, billing, fiscal (CFDI), API troubleshooting
- [Roadmap](https://cordhq.app/roadmap): shipped, in-progress, and planned features
